---
title: "test_cohesion_loop.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\test_cohesion_loop.py"
loc: 81
complexity: 13
logic_score: 2.05
style_score: 3.58
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.03
---

## Intent
The `test_cohesion_loop.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on run_loop. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_loop. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [json](file://json)
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [src.sentinel.taliesin](file://src.sentinel.taliesin)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `run_loop`
